description: Test prioritisation, selection, and dependency-aware ordering for Maven and Gradle.

conventions.errorRemediation: Recoverable error messages contain a line of the form 'Run: <command>'. Parse it and re-invoke.
conventions.jsonOutput: Tasks marked supportsJson=true print parseable JSON to STDOUT (not the build log) when their jsonProperty is set. Use -q (Maven) or --quiet (Gradle) to suppress lifecycle noise on stderr.
conventions.indexLocation: All read tasks consume .test-order/test-dependencies.lz4 in the project (or build/.test-order on Gradle). Tasks with requiresIndex=true fail if it's missing.
conventions.stability: stable = safe for agentic use; deprecated = still works but routes to a stable replacement; experimental = surface or output may change.

tasks.name: help
tasks.description: List available tasks and configuration options. Pass format=json to get this manifest.

tasks.name: show
tasks.description: Unified view: class order, method order, and ML health for the current index.

tasks.name: show-all
tasks.description: Like show, but with no section filtering — emits every available section (class order, method order, ML, static analysis).

tasks.name: show-static-analysis
tasks.description: Print static call-graph analysis details — verbose; intended for debugging dependency detection.

tasks.name: show-order
tasks.description: Deprecated. Use 'show' instead.

tasks.name: show-method-order
tasks.description: Deprecated. Use 'show' instead.

tasks.name: explain
tasks.description: Explain why a specific test class is ranked where it is.

tasks.name: explain-order
tasks.description: Print the class-order report with score breakdowns. Gradle only — Maven users should run 'show' with explain enabled.

tasks.name: explain-method-order
tasks.description: Print the method-order report with score breakdowns. Gradle only.

tasks.name: analyze
tasks.description: Deprecated. Use 'show -Dtestorder.show.ml=true' instead.

tasks.name: dump
tasks.description: Dump the raw dependency index contents (text format).

tasks.name: export-json
tasks.description: Export the dependency index (and run history) as JSON.

tasks.name: metrics
tasks.description: Compute prioritisation metrics (APFD, etc.) over recent runs and write a JSON file. Degrades gracefully when the index is missing — emits a recommendation in the JSON instead of failing.

tasks.name: diagnose
tasks.description: Run diagnostic checks on plugin configuration and state. Use to debug missing-index or misconfiguration errors.

tasks.name: prepare
tasks.description: Configure Surefire/Test for learn or order mode. Bound to process-test-classes in Maven; lifecycle wiring in Gradle.

tasks.name: auto
tasks.description: Auto local-dev mode: learn if needed, then run the selected subset. Maven only — Gradle wires this into the test task automatically.

tasks.name: learn
tasks.description: Run tests in learn mode: instrument tests and build the dependency index from scratch.

tasks.name: instrument
tasks.description: Offline instrumentation: transform classes at build time so the JVM agent isn't needed at test time.

tasks.name: affected
tasks.description: Select the change-affected subset (top-N + diverse fast tests) and configure the test task to run only those.

tasks.name: run-remaining
tasks.description: Run the tests deferred by a previous affected/tiered-select invocation.

tasks.name: tiered-select
tasks.description: Select tests into tier1/tier2/tier3 CI phases (fast feedback / broader coverage / full suite).

tasks.name: run-tier
tasks.description: Run tier 2 or tier 3 from a previous tiered-select run.

tasks.name: run-tiered
tasks.description: Run all tiers in sequence (tier1 → tier2 → tier3).

tasks.name: reactor-order
tasks.description: Compute optimal module execution order for multi-module builds.

tasks.name: dashboard
tasks.description: Generate an interactive HTML dashboard of test orderings, scores, and history.

tasks.name: serve
tasks.description: Generate the dashboard and serve it over a local HTTP server. Long-running — runs until killed; not suitable for agent autopilot use.

tasks.name: optimize
tasks.description: Tune scoring weights via hill-climbing over recent run history. Needs >= 5 failure runs in state files; otherwise emits a warning and exits 0.

tasks.name: snapshot
tasks.description: Save source/test file hash snapshots for change detection.

tasks.name: aggregate
tasks.description: Aggregate per-test .deps files into a single dependency index.

tasks.name: aggregate-all
tasks.description: Aggregate dependency indexes across all subprojects into the root project's index. Gradle only.

tasks.name: compact
tasks.description: Rebuild the dependency index from .deps files, removing stale entries.

tasks.name: restore-instrumentation
tasks.description: Restore class files that were instrumented during offline learn mode back to their original state. Auto-injected at prepare-package phase — users do not need to call this manually.

tasks.name: clean
tasks.description: Remove all test-order state, indexes, and hashes.

tasks.name: download
tasks.description: Download the dependency index from CI (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or HTTP URL).

tasks.name: detect-dependencies
tasks.description: Detect order-dependent tests by running the suite in alternative orders and diffing outcomes.

tasks.name: analyze-mutations
tasks.description: Run mutation testing and record kill-rate data for scoring.

tasks.name: coverage
tasks.description: Collect line/method coverage data and feed it into scoring. Degrades gracefully when the index is missing — emits a warning instead of failing.

tasks.name: offline-restore
tasks.description: Internal: restore offline-instrumented classes after a learn-mode test run. Wired as a finalizer; not invoked directly by users. Gradle only.
